en: But you know what's on my mind right now? It ain't the coffee in my kitchen.
ja: 味見したいけど、今頭にあるのは
zhTW: 我想嚐嚐，但你知道我現在在想什麼嗎？
vi: Toi muon nem thu, nhung ban biet toi dang nghi gi khong?

en: It's the dead nigger in my garage. Oh, Jimmy, don't even worry about it.
Wait a minute, wait a minute. Don't think about anything. I'm going to ask you a question.
ko: 질문 하나 할게. 여기 들어올 때,
ja: 質問させてくれ。ここに来た時、
zhTW: 我想問你一個問題。你開車過來的時候，
vi: Toi muon hoi ban. Khi ban lai xe den day,

en: When you came pulling in here, did you notice a sign out in the front of my house that said dead nigger storage?
ko: 내 집 앞에 '시체 보관소'라는 표지판을 봤어?
ja: 家の前に死体保管所って看板見た?
zhTW: 你有沒有看到我家門前有寫死人儲藏室的牌子？
vi: ban co thay bien bao ghi nha chua xac truoc nha toi khong?

en: Jimmy, you know I ain't seen no shit. Did you notice a sign in the front of my house that said dead nigger storage?
ko: 지미, 나는 그런 걸 본 적 없어.
ja: 家の前に死体保管所って看板見た?
zhTW: 你有沒有看到我家門前有寫死人儲藏室的牌子？
vi: ban co thay bien bao ghi nha chua xac truoc nha toi khong?

en: No. I didn't. You know why you didn't see that sign? Why?
ko: 그게 없어서야, 시체를 보관하는 건 내 일이 아니니까.
ja: なぜ見なかったかわかるか?
zhTW: 你知道你為什麼沒看到嗎？為什麼？
vi: Ban biet tai sao ban khong thay khong? Tai sao?

en: Because it ain't there, because storing dead niggers ain't my fucking business. That's why.
ko: 지미, 우리는 그걸 보관하지 않을 거야.
ja: ないからだ。死体保管は
zhTW: 因為那不在那裡，因為儲存死人
vi: Vi no khong co o do, vi chua xac

en: Jimmy, we're not going to store them.
ko: 결혼 상담사도 필요 없고, 별거도 없어.
ja: 保管するつもりじゃない。
zhTW: 吉米，我們不打算存放他們。
vi: Jimmy, chung toi khong dinh chua ho.

en: No, no, no. Don't you fucking realize, man, that if Bonnie comes home and finds a dead body in her house, I'm going to get divorced.
zhTW: 在家裡發現死人，我會被離婚的。
vi: thay xac chet trong nha, toi se bi ly hon.

en: All right? No marriage counselor, no trial separation. I'm going to get fucking divorced, okay?
ko: 도와주고 싶지만, 아내를 잃고 싶진 않아, 알겠지?
ja: カウンセラーも別居もなし。
zhTW: 好吧，不用婚姻諮詢，也不用分居。
vi: Duoc roi, khong can tu van hon nhan, khong can ly than.

en: And I don't want to get fucking divorced.
ko: 나한테 지미라고 하지 마, 줄스, 알겠어? 나한테 지미라고 하지 마.
vi: Toi khong muon bi ly hon.

en: No, man, you know, fuck. I mean, I want to help you, but I don't want to lose my wife doing it, all right?
ko: 너도 알다시피, 젠장, 나는 너를 도와주고 싶어,
ja: そのために妻を失いたくない。
zhTW: 但我不想因此失去我的妻子，好嗎？
vi: nhung toi khong muon mat vo vi viec nay, duoc chua?

en: Jimmy, Jimmy, she ain't going to leave. Don't fucking Jimmy me, Jules, okay?
ko: 제발 나한테 지미라고 하지 마, 줄스, 알겠어?
ja: ジミー、彼女は去らないよ。
zhTW: 吉米，吉米，她不會離開他的。
vi: Jimmy, Jimmy, co ay se khong bo anh dau.

en: There's nothing that you're going to say that's going to make me forget that I love my wife, is there?
ja: 妻を愛してることは忘れない。
zhTW: 讓我忘記我愛我的妻子。
vi: lam toi quen rang toi yeu vo toi.
